name: Fitbit — Daily Rings
description: Today's Fitbit activity summary. The install flow prompts for a `FITBIT_TOKEN` (Bearer; the standard Fitbit Web API OAuth2 flow is documented in the widget skill). The http source calls `GET /1/user/-/activities/date/{{date}}.json` (the `{{date}}` placeholder comes from the per-instance config, defaulting to today) and projects the daily `summary.steps` / `summary.caloriesOut` / `summary.veryActiveMinutes`. 1x1 is the step count as a bignum; 2x2 stacks the step count above the calories and active-minutes labels.
